let page=figma.root.children.find(p=>p.name==='Trion Site V2');
{const b64='';const bytes=Uint8Array.from(atob(b64),c=>c.charCodeAt(0));const img=figma.createImage(bytes);const f=figma.createFrame();f.name='01-hero';f.resize(1440,900);f.x=0;f.y=0*940;f.fills=[{type:'IMAGE',imageHash:img.hash,scaleMode:'FILL'}];page.appendChild(f);}
{const b64='';const bytes=Uint8Array.from(atob(b64),c=>c.charCodeAt(0));const img=figma.createImage(bytes);const f=figma.createFrame();f.name='02-paraquem';f.resize(1440,900);f.x=0;f.y=1*940;f.fills=[{type:'IMAGE',imageHash:img.hash,scaleMode:'FILL'}];page.appendChild(f);}
{const b64='';const bytes=Uint8Array.from(atob(b64),c=>c.charCodeAt(0));const img=figma.createImage(bytes);const f=figma.createFrame();f.name='03-solucoes';f.resize(1440,900);f.x=0;f.y=2*940;f.fills=[{type:'IMAGE',imageHash:img.hash,scaleMode:'FILL'}];page.appendChild(f);}
{const b64='';const bytes=Uint8Array.from(atob(b64),c=>c.charCodeAt(0));const img=figma.createImage(bytes);const f=figma.createFrame();f.name='04-metodologia';f.resize(1440,900);f.x=0;f.y=3*940;f.fills=[{type:'IMAGE',imageHash:img.hash,scaleMode:'FILL'}];page.appendChild(f);}
{const b64='';const bytes=Uint8Array.from(atob(b64),c=>c.charCodeAt(0));const img=figma.createImage(bytes);const f=figma.createFrame();f.name='05-metricas';f.resize(1440,900);f.x=0;f.y=4*940;f.fills=[{type:'IMAGE',imageHash:img.hash,scaleMode:'FILL'}];page.appendChild(f);}
return 'batch1 done';
